name: Salt Lake City / Cottonwood Canyons
description: High-access Wasatch trip region anchored by Salt Lake City lodging and Cottonwood Canyon resorts.
season_notes: Peak powder demand and canyon traffic can affect both lodging cost and transfer time.

provenance.source_name: Visit Salt Lake Cottonwood Canyons reference
provenance.display_caveat: Prototype region summary; verify current resort, road, and transit conditions.

name: Hokkaido / Niseko and Rusutsu
description: International powder-trip region using New Chitose Airport, with Niseko and Rusutsu as first prototype resorts.
season_notes: January and February lodging and transfers should be booked early; storms can slow road transfers.

provenance.display_caveat: Prototype region summary; verify current schedules, exchange rates, and lodging.
